# Marvel United: Witching Hour + Promos

```{r modular-setup}
pdf_file <- "witching_hour.pdf"
```

Spiffworld's file include both horizontal and vertical (and an extra divider for the "Hybrid" Promo). I will only keep the horizontal dividers.

```{r modular-processing}
img_files <- img_files[c(3:7, 1, 2, 8, 9:14)]
page_breaks <- 9
```
